rationale: The cited paper appears as a brief supporting reference in the limitations/future-research discussion, where the authors note they could not use incentive-compatible conjoint incentives that prior work has shown to improve validity. The 2019 paper does not build its model, identification strategy, or empirical tests on this cited study, and its core methodological foundation is instead the RP-SP data-fusion literature. Because the citation serves as contextual background rather than a functional building block, the role is a passing mention.
